title: JOBY Stock Price Prediction 2025-2026
text: Wall Street analysts have issued various stock price predictions for JOBY (Joby Aviation) covering 2025 and 2026. Analyst consensus shows a broad range of outlooks reflecting the binary nature of the business as it approaches commercialization. The median price target of $11.50 reflects a mix of bullish and bearish views on the company's path to profitability and market adoption. Optimistic analysts like Chris Pierce at Needham project 71.6 percent upside, suggesting the stock could reach the $18 price target. Conservative analysts such as Bill Peterson at JP Morgan suggest 42.8 percent downside, indicating concerns about execution risks and profitability timeline. The wide range of price targets reflects uncertainty about whether Joby can successfully commercialize its aircraft and achieve profitability before capital runs out. Key factors influencing analyst outlooks include FAA certification timeline, manufacturing ramp success, Dubai launch execution, and White House eIPP program progress. Recent Q1 2026 results beat expectations, with revenue of $24 million surpassing forecasts, potentially supporting more bullish outlooks. The company's strong cash position of $2.5 billion at end of Q1 2026 provides runway for continued development and commercialization efforts.
